name: blockcipher-training-accelerator
description: Optional training-speed planning and launcher utilities for blockcipher neural distinguisher experiments.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and run opt-in training speed probes without changing the main trainer.
interface.longDescription: Provides a project-local accelerator plugin for timing existing training commands, splitting experiment matrices for GPU-level parallelism, and documenting future AMP/DataLoader/compile speed profiles behind quality gates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the blockcipher training accelerator plugin.
